items: Use `Optional[Type]` from the typing module instead of Python 3.10+ union syntax (`Type | None`) to ensure compatibility with older Python versions
For simple FastAPI apps under 150 lines of logic, consolidate all code into a single `main.py` file rather than splitting into modules
Weather bots can leverage LLM knowledge of typical climate patterns to generate realistic forecasts without requiring external weather API integrations
When targeting Chinese-speaking users, craft system prompts in Chinese with friendly yet professional tone and structured markdown formatting including emojis
Include fallback logic in prompts to ask for missing required information (like city names) rather than failing silently
Verify module imports immediately after writing files to catch syntax errors before the user encounters them
Structure weather bot responses into clear sections: current conditions, 24-hour forecast, weekly trends, clothing advice, and travel recommendations
